backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a Smart Anganwadi app, handling user profiles and pregnancy records (CRUD, visit history) with access control via a MixinAuthorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (pregnant women navigation tab, PregnantWomenPage, PregnantWomanCard, seed data, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of components, utilities, and pages in the Smart Anganwadi frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens including colors, borders, and chart palette.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing active tab state across five tabs (dashboard, growth, attendance, parent, pregnant-women) and rendering the corresponding page inside the Layout wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AddVisitForm.tsx: Form component for recording a new antenatal visit for a pregnant woman, collecting visit date, weight, blood pressure, haemoglobin, and notes, then submitting via the useAddVisit mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentModeSw: Empty file placeholder for the AssessmentModeSwitcher component that toggles between assessment modes.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceAnalyt: Bar chart component using Recharts to display monthly attendance trend data with a 75% reference line threshold.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceList.t: Card component listing children with their attendance status for the day, showing present/absent counts and delegating toggle actions to AttendanceToggle.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceToggle: Renders a pair of Present/Absent toggle buttons for a child, highlighting the active status with color and calling onToggle when the inactive option is clicked.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Mobile-only fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Dashboard, Growth, Attendance, Parent, Pregnant), highlighting the active tab with a colored border.
Collapsible card displaying a child's basic info and nutritional status badge, expanding to show height/weight/MUAC stats, a weight trend chart, and stagnation or growth alert banners.
frontend/src/components/ChildSummaryCard: Card showing a child's profile summary including BMI, weight, attendance percentage, nutritional status badge, and parent contact details.
frontend/src/components/DashboardSummary: Displays a 2x2 grid of summary stat cards (total enrolled, normal, moderate risk, severe risk) plus a circular progress card showing the average monthly attendance rate.
frontend/src/components/EdgeStorageBanne: Small informational banner indicating the app uses lightweight edge-based storage and works offline.
frontend/src/components/ExportReportButt: Button that opens a dialog informing the user that monthly report export (PDF/CSV) is a planned but not yet available feature.
frontend/src/components/GrowthAlertBanne: Displays a color-coded alert banner for SAM (severe) or MAM (moderate) malnutrition with a referral or program enrollment recommendation for the named child.
frontend/src/components/GrowthForm.tsx: Form for entering a child's growth measurements (name, age, gender, height, weight, MUAC) that calculates BMI, classifies nutritional status, and displays the result with alerts; truncated before completion.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell providing a sticky header with branding, a desktop tab navigation bar, a scrollable content area, a desktop footer, and the mobile BottomNavigation component.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyAttendanc: Displays a monthly attendance summary card for each child, showing a progress bar and percentage with a warning indicator if attendance falls below 75%.
frontend/src/components/NutritionalStatu: A badge component that displays a child's nutritional status (normal, moderate, severe) with color-coded styling and a dot indicator.
frontend/src/components/NutritionTips.ts: Renders a styled list of nutrition tips and recommendations based on a child's nutritional status (normal, moderate, or severe).
frontend/src/components/PregnantWomanCar: Displays a collapsible card for a pregnant woman's health record including visit history, risk level, and an option to add new visits via a dialog form. Includes converter utilities to normalize backend and local data into a unified CardData type.
frontend/src/components/PregnantWomanReg: A form component for registering a new pregnant woman, computing gestational age and EDD from LMP date, and submitting the record to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RiskLevelBadge.t: A badge component that displays a pregnancy risk level (normal, moderate, high) with color-coded styling, and exports helper functions for retrieving risk color classes.
frontend/src/components/RiskSummaryTable: Renders a sorted list of all children by nutritional risk severity, displaying each child's name, age, BMI, and status badge in a card.
frontend/src/components/SMSAlertButton.t: A button that simulates sending an SMS alert to a parent by opening a confirmation dialog with child and parent details.
frontend/src/components/StagnationWarnin: Displays a warning banner indicating that a child's weight has not increased over the last three visits and recommends nutritional counseling.
frontend/src/components/UnitSelection.ts: An empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/WeightTrendChart: Renders a line chart of a child's weight trend across their last three visits using Recharts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all pregnancy records and mutating backend data via addPregnancyRecord and addVisit actor calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines a government-friendly OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS variables and status utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Attendance.tsx: Attendance management page that displays a toggleable present/absent list for children and a monthly attendance summary using dummy data.
frontend/src/pages/GrowthMonitoring.tsx: Child growth monitoring page that renders a growth entry form and a list of child record cards with WHO-standard nutritional assessment context.
frontend/src/pages/ParentView.tsx: Parent-facing dashboard that lets a user select a child and view their health summary, nutrition tips, and an SMS alert button.
frontend/src/pages/PregnantWomenPage.tsx: Pregnant women management page that displays ANC records from the backend (falling back to dummy data), with search/filter controls, summary stats, and a registration dialog.
frontend/src/pages/WorkerDashboard.tsx: Main worker dashboard page that composes summary cards, attendance analytics chart, risk summary table, and export button using stats derived from dummy data.
frontend/src/utils/attendanceData.ts: Defines attendance data types and provides simulated monthly attendance records and trend data for 7 children, plus a lookup helper.
frontend/src/utils/bmiCalculations.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/utils/dashboardData.ts: Aggregates dummy child and attendance data into a single stats object (totals, risk counts, attendance rate, monthly trend) for the worker dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/dummyData.ts: Defines TypeScript types for child records and exports an array of 7 dummy children with nutritional status, visit history, and a weight stagnation detection helper.
frontend/src/utils/gestationalCalculatio: Provides utility functions for pregnant women tracking: gestational age, trimester, EDD calculation, date formatting, and ICP nanosecond timestamp conversion.
frontend/src/utils/growthCalculations.ts: Implements BMI calculation and WHO-based nutritional status classification (normal/moderate/severe) for children under 5, with MUAC priority and age-adjusted thresholds.
frontend/src/utils/pregnantWomenData.ts: Defines TypeScript types and dummy seed data for pregnant women records including visit history, risk levels, trimester, and health metrics.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, spacing, and keyframe animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing an early childhood development/community health app, listing existing implemented features (pregnant women navigation tab, page, card component, seed data, gestational calculations) and new pending feature requests for a pregnant women tracking module.
